javascript:(()%3D%3E%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20r%3D%22permreg-root%22%2CD%3D%22permreg.webUrl%22%2Cg%3D%22%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22%2Cv%3D%22%5Cu7D44%5Cu7E54%5Cu533A%5Cu5206%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%22%2Cq%3Ddocument.getElementById(r)%3Bq%26%26q.remove()%3Bconst%20n%3D%7BwebUrl%3A%22%22%2Cl1%3A%5B%5D%2Cl2%3A%5B%5D%2CselectedL1%3Anull%2Cready%3A!1%2Cbusy%3A!1%7D%3Bfunction%20B()%7Btry%7Bif(window._spPageContextInfo%26%26window._spPageContextInfo.webAbsoluteUrl)return%20window._spPageContextInfo.webAbsoluteUrl%7Dcatch%7B%7Dconst%20t%3Dlocation.href.match(%2F%5E(https%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%5B%5E%2F%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5C%2F(%3F%3Asites%7Cteams)%5C%2F%5B%5E%2F%5D%2B)%3F)%2F)%3Breturn%20t%3Ft%5B1%5D%3Alocation.origin%7Dn.webUrl%3DlocalStorage.getItem(D)%7C%7CB()%3Bconst%20F%3D()%3D%3En.webUrl.replace(%2F%5C%2F%2B%24%2F%2C%22%22)%3Blet%20T%3Dnull%3Basync%20function%20X()%7Bif(T%26%26Date.now()%3CT.exp)return%20T.value%3Bconst%20t%3Dawait%20fetch(F()%2B%22%2F_api%2Fcontextinfo%22%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3A%7BAccept%3A%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22%7D%2Ccredentials%3A%22same-origin%22%7D)%3Bif(!t.ok)throw%20new%20Error(%22contextinfo%20%5Cu306E%5Cu53D6%5Cu5F97%5Cu306B%5Cu5931%5Cu6557%20(HTTP%20%22%2Bt.status%2B%22)%5Cu3002%5Cu30B5%5Cu30A4%5Cu30C8URL%5Cu3092%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%5Cu3002%22)%3Bconst%20e%3Dawait%20t.json()%3Breturn%20T%3D%7Bvalue%3Ae.FormDigestValue%2Cexp%3ADate.now()%2BMath.max(60%2C(e.FormDigestTimeoutSeconds%7C%7C1800)-60)*1e3%7D%2CT.value%7Dasync%20function%20E(t%2Ce%2Ca%2Ci)%7Bconst%20o%3DObject.assign(%7BAccept%3A%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22%7D%2Ci)%3Bt!%3D%3D%22GET%22%26%26(o%5B%22X-RequestDigest%22%5D%3Dawait%20X()%2Ca!%3Dnull%26%26(o%5B%22Content-Type%22%5D%3D%22application%2Fjson%3Bodata%3Dnometadata%22))%3Bconst%20s%3Dawait%20fetch(F()%2Be%2C%7Bmethod%3At%3D%3D%3D%22GET%22%3F%22GET%22%3A%22POST%22%2Cheaders%3Ao%2Ccredentials%3A%22same-origin%22%2Cbody%3Aa!%3Dnull%3FJSON.stringify(a)%3Avoid%200%7D)%3Bif(!s.ok)%7Blet%20c%3D%22HTTP%20%22%2Bs.status%3Btry%7Bconst%20p%3Dawait%20s.json()%2Cl%3Dp%5B%22odata.error%22%5D%26%26p%5B%22odata.error%22%5D.message%26%26p%5B%22odata.error%22%5D.message.value%7C%7Cp.error%26%26p.error.message%26%26(p.error.message.value%7C%7Cp.error.message)%3Bl%26%26(c%2B%3D%22%20%5Cu2014%20%22%2Bl)%7Dcatch%7B%7Dconst%20d%3Dnew%20Error(c)%3Bthrow%20d.status%3Ds.status%2Cd%7Dconst%20u%3Dawait%20s.text()%3Breturn%20u%3FJSON.parse(u)%3Anull%7Dconst%20C%3Dt%3D%3EE(%22GET%22%2Ct)%2CI%3D(t%2Ce)%3D%3EE(%22POST%22%2Ct%2Ce)%2Cj%3D(t%2Ce)%3D%3EE(%22POST%22%2Ct%2Ce%2C%7B%22X-HTTP-Method%22%3A%22MERGE%22%2C%22IF-MATCH%22%3A%22*%22%7D)%2CY%3Dt%3D%3EE(%22POST%22%2Ct%2Cnull%2C%7B%22X-HTTP-Method%22%3A%22DELETE%22%2C%22IF-MATCH%22%3A%22*%22%7D)%2Cb%3Dt%3D%3E%22%2F_api%2Fweb%2Flists%2Fgetbytitle('%22%2BencodeURIComponent(t.replace(%2F'%2Fg%2C%22''%22))%2B%22')%22%3Basync%20function%20A(t)%7Btry%7Breturn(await%20C(b(t)%2B%22%3F%24select%3DId%22)).Id%7Dcatch(e)%7Bif(e.status%3D%3D%3D404)return%20null%3Bthrow%20e%7D%7Dasync%20function%20H(t%2Ce)%7Bconst%20a%3Dawait%20A(t)%3Breturn%20a%7C%7C(await%20I(%22%2F_api%2Fweb%2Flists%22%2C%7BTitle%3At%2CBaseTemplate%3A100%2CDescription%3Ae%7D)).Id%7Dasync%20function%20_(t%2Ce)%7Btry%7Breturn%20await%20C(b(t)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fgetbyinternalnameortitle('%22%2Be%2B%22')%3F%24select%3DId%22)%2C!0%7Dcatch(a)%7Bif(a.status%3D%3D%3D404)return!1%3Bthrow%20a%7D%7Dasync%20function%20P(t%2Ce%2Ca%2Ci)%7Bawait%20_(t%2Ce)%7C%7C(await%20I(b(t)%2B%22%2Ffields%22%2CObject.assign(%7BTitle%3Ae%7D%2Ci))%2Cawait%20j(b(t)%2B%22%2Ffields%2Fgetbyinternalnameortitle('%22%2Be%2B%22')%22%2C%7BTitle%3Aa%7D))%7Dasync%20function%20J(t%2Ce%2Ca%2Ci)%7Bif(await%20_(t%2Ce))return%3Bconst%20o%3D%22%3CField%20Type%3D'Lookup'%20DisplayName%3D'%22%2Be%2B%22'%20Name%3D'%22%2Be%2B%22'%20StaticName%3D'%22%2Be%2B%22'%20List%3D'%7B%22%2Bi%2B%22%7D'%20ShowFi 6%24top%3D4999%22)%5D)%3Bn.l1%3Dt.value%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Cn.l2%3De.value%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Cn.selectedL1%26%26!n.l1.some(a%3D%3Ea.Id%3D%3D%3Dn.selectedL1)%26%26(n.selectedL1%3Dnull)%2C!n.selectedL1%26%26n.l1.length%26%26(n.selectedL1%3Dn.l1%5B0%5D.Id)%7Dconst%20tt%3Dt%3D%3Et.reduce((e%2Ca)%3D%3EMath.max(e%2Ca.SortOrder%7C%7C0)%2C0)%2B10%3Basync%20function%20et(t%2Ce)%7Bawait%20I(b(t)%2B%22%2Fitems%22%2Ce)%7Dasync%20function%20O(t%2Ce%2Ca)%7Bawait%20j(b(t)%2B%22%2Fitems(%22%2Be%2B%22)%22%2Ca)%7Dasync%20function%20rt(t%2Ce)%7Bawait%20Y(b(t)%2B%22%2Fitems(%22%2Be%2B%22)%22)%7Dasync%20function%20at(t%2Ce%2Ca%2Ci)%7Bconst%20o%3De.indexOf(a)%2Cs%3Do%2Bi%3Bif(s%3C0%7C%7Cs%3E%3De.length)return%3Bconst%20u%3De.map(l%3D%3El.SortOrder)%3Bif(u.some((l%2Cw)%3D%3El%3D%3Dnull%7C%7Cu.indexOf(l)!%3D%3Dw))for(let%20l%3D0%3Bl%3Ce.length%3Bl%2B%2B)e%5Bl%5D.SortOrder%3D(l%2B1)*10%2Cawait%20O(t%2Ce%5Bl%5D.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3Ae%5Bl%5D.SortOrder%7D)%3Bconst%20d%3De%5Bo%5D%2Cp%3De%5Bs%5D%3Bawait%20O(t%2Cd.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3Ap.SortOrder%7D)%2Cawait%20O(t%2Cp.Id%2C%7BSortOrder%3Ad.SortOrder%7D)%7Dconst%20nt%3D%7B%22chevron-up%22%3A'%3Cpolyline%20points%3D%2218%2015%2012%209%206%2015%22%2F%3E'%2C%22chevron-down%22%3A'%3Cpolyline%20points%3D%226%209%2012%2015%2018%209%22%2F%3E'%2C%22edit-2%22%3A'%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M17%203a2.828%202.828%200%201%201%204%204L7.5%2020.5%202%2022l1.5-5.5L17%203z%22%2F%3E'%2C%22trash-2%22%3A'%3Cpolyline%20points%3D%223%206%205%206%2021%206%22%2F%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M19%206v14a2%202%200%200%201-2%202H7a2%202%200%200%201-2-2V6m3%200V4a2%202%200%200%201%202-2h4a2%202%200%200%201%202%202v2%22%2F%3E%3Cline%20x1%3D%2210%22%20y1%3D%2211%22%20x2%3D%2210%22%20y2%3D%2217%22%2F%3E%3Cline%20x1%3D%2214%22%20y1%3D%2211%22%20x2%3D%2214%22%20y2%3D%2217%22%2F%3E'%2Cx%3A'%3Cline%20x1%3D%2218%22%20y1%3D%226%22%20x2%3D%226%22%20y2%3D%2218%22%2F%3E%3Cline%20x1%3D%226%22%20y1%3D%226%22%20x2%3D%2218%22%20y2%3D%2218%22%2F%3E'%2C%22refresh-cw%22%3A'%3Cpolyline%20points%3D%2223%204%2023%2010%2017%2010%22%2F%3E%3Cpolyline%20points%3D%221%2020%201%2014%207%2014%22%2F%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M3.51%209a9%209%200%200%201%2014.85-3.36L23%2010M1%2014l4.64%204.36A9%209%200%200%200%2020.49%2015%22%2F%3E'%2Cplus%3A'%3Cline%20x1%3D%2212%22%20y1%3D%225%22%20x2%3D%2212%22%20y2%3D%2219%22%2F%3E%3Cline%20x1%3D%225%22%20y1%3D%2212%22%20x2%3D%2219%22%20y2%3D%2212%22%2F%3E'%2Ccopy%3A'%3Crect%20x%3D%229%22%20y%3D%229%22%20width%3D%2213%22%20height%3D%2213%22%20rx%3D%222%22%20ry%3D%222%22%2F%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M5%2015H4a2%202%200%200%201-2-2V4a2%202%200%200%201%202-2h9a2%202%200%200%201%202%202v1%22%2F%3E'%7D%2Ch%3Dt%3D%3E'%3Csvg%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2024%2024%22%20fill%3D%22none%22%20stroke%3D%22currentColor%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.7%22%20stroke-linecap%3D%22round%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%20aria-hidden%3D%22true%22%3E'%2Bnt%5Bt%5D%2B%22%3C%2Fsvg%3E%22%2C%24%3Dt%3D%3EString(t%3F%3F%22%22).replace(%2F%26%2Fg%2C%22%26amp%3B%22).replace(%2F%3C%2Fg%2C%22%26lt%3B%22).replace(%2F%3E%2Fg%2C%22%26gt%3B%22).replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C%22%26quot%3B%22)%2Cot%3D%60%0A%23%24%7Br%7D%7B%0A%20%20%2F*%20SP%20host%20CSS%20%5Cu30B7%5Cu30FC%5Cu30EB%5Cu30C9%5Cu3002%5Cu5F8C%5Cu7D9A%5Cu5BA3%5Cu8A00%5Cu3068%20custom%20property%20%5Cu306F%20all%20%5Cu306E%5Cu5BFE%5Cu8C61%5Cu5916%2F%5Cu4E0A%5Cu66F8%5Cu304D%5Cu3067%5Cu751F%5Cu304D%5Cu6B8B%5Cu308B%20*%2F%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%20%20%2F*%20----%20design%20tokens%20(Spira%20%5Cu5171%5Cu901A)%20----%20*%2F%0A%20%20--ink%3A%232a2a26%3B%20--ink-3%3A%237a766c%3B%20--ink-4%3A%23a8a39a%3B%0A%20%20--paper%3A%23fafaf7%3B%20--paper-2%3A%23f3f1ea%3B%20--paper-2-strong%3A%23ece8de%3B%20--paper-3%3A%23e8e4d8%3B%0A%20%20--line%3Argba(42%2C42%2C38%2C.12)%3B%20--line-strong%3Argba(42%2C42%2C38%2C.18)%3B%0A%20%20--accent%3A%237a8a78%3B%20--accent-soft%3Argba(122%2C138%2C120%2C.18)%3B%20--accent-strong%3A%235e6f5c%3B%0A%20%20--danger%3A%23b8534a%3B%20--danger-soft%3Argba(184%2C83%2C74%2C.10)%3B%20--warn%3A%23c47f1c%3B%20--ok%3A%232f6f5e%3B%0A%20%20--font-sans%3A%22Meiryo% 22%7D%3C%2Fspan%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Clabel%20class%3D%22pr-active%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu6709%5Cu52B9%2F%5Cu7121%5Cu52B9%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22checkbox%22%20data-act%3D%22active%22%20aria-label%3D%22%5Cu6709%5Cu52B9%22%20%24%7Bo.Active!%3D%3D!1%3F%22checked%22%3A%22%22%7D%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Flabel%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pr-btn--icon%20pr-btn--icon-action%22%20data-act%3D%22rename%22%20aria-label%3D%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%3E%24%7Bh(%22edit-2%22)%7D%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pr-btn--icon%20pr-btn--icon-trash%22%20data-act%3D%22del%22%20aria-label%3D%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%22%20title%3D%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%22%3E%24%7Bh(%22trash-2%22)%7D%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3Blet%20i%3Bn.ready%3Fi%3D%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-cols%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-col%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-sub%22%3E%3Cb%3E%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%3C%2Fb%3E%3Cspan%20class%3D%22pr-count%22%3E%24%7Bn.l1.length%7D%5Cu4EF6%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-toolbar%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22text%22%20class%3D%22pr-input%22%20id%3D%22pr-add-l1%22%20placeholder%3D%22%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu306E%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu3092%5Cu5165%5Cu529B%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pr-btn--primary%22%20data-act%3D%22add-l1%22%3E%24%7Bh(%22plus%22)%7D%5Cu8FFD%5Cu52A0%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-rows%22%3E%24%7Bn.l1.map(o%3D%3Ea(o%2C%22l1%22%2Co.Id%3D%3D%3Dn.selectedL1%3F%22%20sel%22%3A%22%22)).join(%22%22)%7C%7C'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-empty%22%3E%5Cu672A%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-col%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-sub%22%3E%3Cb%3E%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%24%7Be%3F%22%20%5Cu2014%20%22%2B%24(e.Title)%3A%22%22%7D%3C%2Fb%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cspan%20class%3D%22pr-count%22%3E%24%7Be%3Ft(e.Id).length%2B%22%5Cu4EF6%22%3A%22%22%7D%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%24%7Be%3F%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-toolbar%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cinput%20type%3D%22text%22%20class%3D%22pr-input%22%20id%3D%22pr-add-l2%22%20placeholder%3D%22%5Cu300C%24%7B%24(e.Title)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu914D%5Cu4E0B%5Cu306E%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu3092%5Cu5165%5Cu529B%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cbutton%20class%3D%22pr-btn%20pr-btn--primary%22%20data-act%3D%22add-l2%22%3E%24%7Bh(%22plus%22)%7D%5Cu8FFD%5Cu52A0%3C%2Fbutton%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-rows%22%3E%24%7Bt(e.Id).map(o%3D%3Ea(o%2C%22l2%22)).join(%22%22)%7C%7C'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-empty%22%3E%5Cu672A%5Cu767B%5Cu9332%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3A'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-empty%22%3E%5Cu5DE6%5Cu3067%5Cu7B2C1%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu3092%5Cu9078%5Cu629E%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%7D%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%3Ai%3D%60%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22pr-hero%22%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Ch4%3E%5Cu30DE%5Cu30B9%5Cu30BF%5Cu30EA%5Cu30B9%5Cu30C8%5Cu304C%5Cu307E%5Cu3060%5Cu3042%5Cu308A%5Cu307E%5Cu305B%5Cu3093%3C%2Fh4%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cp%3E%5Cu3053%5Cu306E%5Cu30B5%5Cu30A4%5Cu30C8%5Cu306B%5Cu300C%24%7B%24(g)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu3068%5Cu300C%24%7B%24(v)%7D%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu4F5C%5Cu6210%5Cu3057%5Cu307E%5Cu3059 F%22)%7D)%3Breturn%7Dif(d)if(a%3D%3D%3D%22rename%22)%7Bconst%20p%3Dawait%20G(%7Btitle%3A%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%2CinputValue%3Ad.Title%2CokLabel%3A%22%5Cu4FDD%5Cu5B58%22%7D)%3Bif(!p%7C%7Cp%3D%3D%3Dd.Title)return%3Bk(%22%5Cu540D%5Cu79F0%5Cu5909%5Cu66F4%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20O(u%2Cs%2C%7BTitle%3Ap%7D)%2Cawait%20S()%7D)%7Delse%20if(a%3D%3D%3D%22del%22)%7Bif(o%3D%3D%3D%22l1%22)%7Bconst%20l%3Dn.l2.filter(w%3D%3Ew.Level1%26%26w.Level1.Id%3D%3D%3Ds)%3Bif(l.length)%7BL(%22warn%22%2C%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bd.Title%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu306B%5Cu306F%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu304C%20%22%2Bl.length%2B%22%20%5Cu4EF6%5Cu3042%5Cu308A%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu3002%5Cu5148%5Cu306B%5Cu7B2C2%5Cu968E%5Cu5C64%5Cu3092%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%22)%3Breturn%7D%7Dif(!await%20G(%7Btitle%3A%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu306E%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%22%2Cmessage%3A%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bd.Title%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3057%5Cu307E%5Cu3059%5Cu3002%5Cu3053%5Cu306E%5Cu64CD%5Cu4F5C%5Cu306F%5Cu5143%5Cu306B%5Cu623B%5Cu305B%5Cu307E%5Cu305B%5Cu3093%5Cu3002%22%2CokLabel%3A%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3059%5Cu308B%22%2Cdanger%3A!0%7D))return%3Bk(%22%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20rt(u%2Cs)%2Cawait%20S()%2CL(%22ok%22%2C%22%5Cu300C%22%2Bd.Title%2B%22%5Cu300D%5Cu3092%5Cu524A%5Cu9664%5Cu3057%5Cu307E%5Cu3057%5Cu305F%22)%7D)%7Delse(a%3D%3D%3D%22up%22%7C%7Ca%3D%3D%3D%22down%22)%26%26k(%22%5Cu4E26%5Cu3079%5Cu66FF%5Cu3048%22%2Casync()%3D%3E%7Bawait%20at(u%2Cc%2Cd%2Ca%3D%3D%3D%22up%22%3F-1%3A1)%2Cawait%20S()%7D)%7D)%2CM()%2Ck(%22%5Cu8AAD%5Cu8FBC%22%2CS)%7D)()%3B%0A
